```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:0.7em;">

  <div style="aspect-ratio:16/10;border-radius:12px;border:1.5px solid #B5D0F0;background:linear-gradient(150deg,#DCE9FA,#EAF3FC);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.4em;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(58,125,201,0.16);">
   <i data-lucide="utensils-crossed" style="width:1.4em;height:1.4em;stroke-width:1.7;color:#3A7DC9;"></i>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.46em;font-weight:700;color:#3A7DC9;">recipe</div>
  </div>

  <div style="aspect-ratio:16/10;border-radius:12px;border:1.5px solid #E1BEE7;background:linear-gradient(150deg,#F3E5F5,#F8EFF9);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.4em;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(123,44,191,0.16);">
   <i data-lucide="martini" style="width:1.4em;height:1.4em;stroke-width:1.7;color:#7B2CBF;"></i>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.46em;font-weight:700;color:#7B2CBF;">cocktail</div>
  </div>

  <div style="aspect-ratio:16/10;border-radius:12px;border:1.5px solid #C8E6C9;background:linear-gradient(150deg,#E8F5E9,#F1FAF1);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.4em;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(44,132,117,0.16);">
   <i data-lucide="pen-line" style="width:1.4em;height:1.4em;stroke-width:1.7;color:#2C8475;"></i>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.46em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">blog</div>
  </div>

  <div style="aspect-ratio:16/10;border-radius:12px;border:1.5px solid #FAE9C8;background:linear-gradient(150deg,#FEF5E7,#FFFAF0);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.4em;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(196,136,26,0.16);">
   <i data-lucide="presentation" style="width:1.4em;height:1.4em;stroke-width:1.7;color:#C4881A;"></i>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.46em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;">slide</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.95em;text-align:center;font-size:0.52em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">
  Different subjects, <strong style="color:#5654A2;">one hand</strong>. Every banner on the site comes from <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#2C8475;background:#E8F5E9;padding:0.05em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">/ph-image</code>, so they read as a matched set.
 </div>

</div>
```
